glosses.vi: sự buồn chán; sự nhàm chán

sentences.target: Ich sterbe vor Langeweile im Büro.

translations.de: Ich sterbe vor Langeweile im Büro.
translations.en: I'm dying of boredom at the office.
translations.es: Me muero de aburrimiento en la oficina.
translations.it: Sto morendo di noia in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在办公室无聊得要死。
translations.ru: Я в офисе умираю со скуки.
translations.pt: Estou morrendo de tédio no escritório.
translations.vi: Tôi chán chết ở văn phòng.
translations.nl: Ik verveel me dood op kantoor.
translations.uk: Я в офісі помираю з нудьги.
translations.hi: मैं ऑफिस में बोरियत से मर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Πεθαίνω από τη βαρεμάρα στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Jeg dør av kjedsomhet på kontoret.
translations.id: Aku bosan setengah mati di kantor.
translations.sv: Jag dör av tristess på kontoret.
translations.da: Jeg dør af kedsomhed på kontoret.
translations.ja: オフィスで退屈すぎて死にそう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; used idiomatically with 'vor + Dat' to express exaggeration.
Preposition governing dative; expresses cause ('of/from' boredom).
Feminine noun; singular dative as the object of 'vor' (cause).
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition with dative marking location.
Neuter noun; singular dative as the complement of 'im' (location).

sentences.target: Die Kinder klagen über Langeweile am verregneten Nachmittag.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈklaːgən ˈyːbɐ ˈlaŋəˌvaɪlə am fɛɐ̯ˈʁeːgnətən ˈnaχmɪtaːk/

translations.de: Die Kinder klagen über Langeweile am verregneten Nachmittag.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈklaːgən ˈyːbɐ ˈlaŋəˌvaɪlə am fɛɐ̯ˈʁeːgnətən ˈnaχmɪtaːk/
translations.en: The kids complain about boredom on a rainy afternoon.
translations.es: Los niños se quejan de aburrimiento en una tarde lluviosa.
translations.fr: Les enfants se plaignent de s'ennuyer pendant un après-midi pluvieux.
translations.it: I bambini si lamentano della noia in un pomeriggio piovoso.
translations.ko: 비 오는 오후에 아이들이 심심하다고 투덜거린다.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在雨天下午抱怨无聊。
translations.yue: 落雨嘅下晝，啲細路話好悶。
translations.ru: Дети жалуются, что им скучно в дождливый день.
translations.pt: As crianças reclamam de tédio numa tarde chuvosa.
translations.he: הילדים מתלוננים שמשעמם להם באחר הצהריים גשום.
translations.tr: Çocuklar yağmurlu bir öğleden sonra can sıkıntısından şikâyet ediyor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ than phiền vì buồn chán vào một buổi chiều mưa.
translations.ar: الأطفال يشكون من الملل في ظهيرة ممطرة.
translations.nl: De kinderen klagen dat ze zich vervelen op een regenachtige middag.
translations.uk: Діти скаржуються, що їм нудно в дощовий післяобідній час.
translations.hu: A gyerekek panaszkodnak, hogy esős délutánon unatkoznak.
translations.hi: बरसाती दोपहर में बच्चे बोरियत की शिकायत करते हैं।
translations.pl: Dzieci narzekają na nudę w deszczowe popołudnie.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά παραπονιούνται ότι βαριούνται σε ένα βροχερό απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Barna klager over at de kjeder seg på en regnfull ettermiddag.
translations.id: Anak-anak mengeluh bosan pada sore yang hujan.
translations.sv: Barnen klagar på att de har tråkigt en regnig eftermiddag.
translations.ro: Copiii se plâng că se plictisesc într-o după-amiază ploioasă.
translations.cs: Děti si stěžují, že se nudí během deštivého odpoledne.
translations.da: Børnene klager over, at de keder sig en regnfuld eftermiddag.
translations.fi: Lapset valittavat, että on tylsää sateisena iltapäivänä.
translations.ja: 雨の午後、子どもたちは退屈だと文句を言う。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural agreeing with 'Kinder'.
Plural noun; nominative subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person plural present indicative; selects 'über + Acc' for the topic of complaint.
Preposition governing accusative here; introduces the topic of complaint.
Feminine noun; singular accusative as the object of 'über'.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition with dative in a temporal PP.
Attributive adjective; dative masculine singular (weak inflection) agreeing with 'Nachmittag'.
Masculine noun; singular dative as complement of 'am' (temporal setting).

translations.fr: Cette série est d’un ennui mortel.
translations.it: Questa serie è una noia mortale.
translations.el: Αυτή η σειρά είναι σκέτη βαρεμάρα.
translations.sv: Den här serien är ren tristess.
translations.ja: このシリーズは退屈そのものだ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; nominative feminine singular modifying 'Serie'.
Feminine noun; nominative singular subject.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate nominal.
Attributive adjective within the predicate NP; strong declension, nominative feminine singular (no article).
Feminine noun; predicate nominative identifying what the series is.

sentences.target: Er vertreibt sich die Langeweile mit einem Spiel.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈtʁaɪ̯pt zɪç diː ˈlaŋəˌvaɪlə mɪt ˈaɪ̯nəm ʃpiːl/

translations.de: Er vertreibt sich die Langeweile mit einem Spiel.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈtʁaɪ̯pt zɪç diː ˈlaŋəˌvaɪlə mɪt ˈaɪ̯nəm ʃpiːl/
translations.en: He gets rid of his boredom with a game.
translations.es: Mata el aburrimiento con un juego.
translations.fr: Il tue l’ennui avec un jeu.
translations.it: Scaccia la noia con un gioco.
translations.zh-Hans: 他用一个游戏打发无聊。
translations.pt: Ele mata o tédio com um jogo.
translations.he: הוא מגרש את השעמום עם משחק.
translations.vi: Anh ấy xua tan buồn chán bằng một trò chơi.
translations.nl: Hij verdrijft de verveling met een spel.
translations.hi: वह एक खेल से बोरियत दूर करता है।
translations.el: Διώχνει τη βαρεμάρα με ένα παιχνίδι.
translations.nb: Han fordriver kjedsomheten med et spill.
translations.id: Dia mengusir kebosanan dengan bermain gim.
translations.sv: Han fördriver tristessen med ett spel.
translations.ro: Își alungă plictiseala cu un joc.
translations.da: Han fordriver kedsomheden med et spil.
translations.ja: 彼はゲームで退屈を紛らわせている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; with reflexive dative 'sich' forms the idiom 'sich die Langeweile vertreiben'.
Reflexive pronoun, dative 3rd singular; indirect/benefactive object with 'vertreiben'.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular agreeing with 'Langeweile'.
Feminine noun; accusative direct object (entity being driven away).
Preposition governing dative; marks instrument/means.
Indefinite article; dative neuter singular modifying 'Spiel'.
Neuter noun; dative singular as object of 'mit' (means).
